/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libsuper_simple_task_runtime.so -o libsuper_simple_task_runtime.so CMakeFiles/super_simple_task_runtime.dir/runtime.cpp.o CMakeFiles/super_simple_task_runtime.dir/runtime_main.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/proj/alanfaascache-PG0/late_feb/new/prev_commit/drv/build/api ../api/libdrvapi.so /usr/lib/libboost_coroutine.so.1.90.0 /usr/lib/libboost_context.so.1.90.0
